description: The Askable Studies dashboard page loads.
frame_description: The user is on the Studies page, which displays a table of research studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, Closing date, Created date, and Created by.

description: The user hovers over various studies in the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the list of active and draft studies.

description: The user clicks on the 'Askable | Opportunities' browser tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top of the browser window and clicks on the second tab.

description: The browser switches to the Opportunities page.
frame_description: The screen content changes to show an opportunity detail page for 'Internal AI Mod website test'.

description: The Opportunities page content is fully displayed.
frame_description: A pink card with study details and an 'Apply' button is visible.

description: The user clicks back on the 'Askable | Studies' browser tab.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the first tab in the browser and clicks.

description: The browser switches back to the Studies page.
frame_description: The screen returns to the list of studies.

description: The user hovers over the search input field.
frame_description: The cursor lingers near the search bar at the top of the studies list.

description: The user clicks into the search input field to focus it.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the search bar.

description: The user types 'participant app' into the search bar.
frame_description: Text appears in the search bar as the user types.

description: The study list updates to show results matching 'participant app'.
frame_description: The table rows refresh to show filtered results.

description: The user hovers over the filtered search results.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the studies that appeared after the search.

description: The user clicks the 'Reset' button to clear the search.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Reset' button next to the search bar.

description: The search is cleared and the full list of studies is restored.
frame_description: The search text disappears and the full table of studies reappears.

description: The user hovers over the search input field again.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the search bar area.

description: The user clicks into the search input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the search bar.

description: The user types 'participant' into the search bar.
frame_description: The word 'participant' is typed into the search field.

description: The study list updates for the search term 'participant'.
frame_description: The list of studies filters based on the current input.

description: The user continues typing ' app' into the search bar.
frame_description: The user adds ' app' to the existing search term.

description: The study list updates for the search term 'participant app'.
frame_description: The list filters further as the search term is completed.

description: The user hovers over the team selector dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top left of the page over the team name.

description: The user clicks back into the search bar.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the search bar to edit the text.

description: The user clears the text in the search bar.
frame_description: The search text is deleted.

description: The study list updates as the search is cleared.
frame_description: The list of studies begins to reset.

description: The user types 'partici' into the search bar.
frame_description: The user types a partial search term.

description: The user clicks the 'Reset' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Reset' button again.

description: The search is cleared.
frame_description: The search field is emptied and the full list returns.

description: The user hovers over the team selector dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor stays over the team name in the top left sidebar area.

description: The user clicks on the team selector dropdown.
frame_description: The user clicks the team name to open the selection menu.

description: The team selection dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: A dropdown menu appears showing a list of different teams/accounts.

description: The user hovers over various team names in the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor moves down the list of teams in the open dropdown menu.
